title: See it in action
description: Define one contract file. Run one command. Get typed Angular client, NestJS controller, and Zod schemas — all from a single source of truth.
valueTitle: Why this matters in real teams
valueItems: Eliminates duplicated DTO and endpoint definitions across frontend/backend.
Reduces release risk by making API changes explicit and checkable.
Keeps generated artifacts deterministic so reviews and CI stay reliable.
outputTitle: What you actually get after generate
outputItems: Core summary + canonical contract model from @fr4n0m/core.
flowDescription: Run the simulation to watch contract data flow through the generator and materialize as production-ready artifacts.
